name: commy
description: Hexagonal MCP plugin exposing commy ports to Claude Code sessions. V1 hard-wired to the Zulip driven adapter.

ZULIP_SITE.title: Zulip realm URL
ZULIP_SITE.description: Base URL of the Zulip realm this plugin operates against (e.g. https://zulip.example.com). Used by every Zulip HTTP call.

ZULIP_MINTER_EMAIL.title: Minter user email
ZULIP_MINTER_EMAIL.description: Delivery email of the human-type minter user that owns all bots managed via this plugin. Must be a member of the realm's can_create_bots_group.

ZULIP_MINTER_API_KEY.title: Minter API key
ZULIP_MINTER_API_KEY.description: API key for the minter user. Stored in the system keychain; never written to settings.json.

COMMY_SUBSCRIBE.title: Auto-subscribe targets
COMMY_SUBSCRIBE.description: Comma-separated subscribe tokens applied at MCP-child boot before tools are announced. Each token is one of: 'channel:<name>', 'thread:<channel>/<thread>', 'new-topics:<channel>', 'mentions'. Example: 'channel:assistant,mentions'. Leave blank to skip auto-subscription — the plugin still boots, and a session can subscribe at runtime via the 'subscribe' MCP tool.

COMMY_CATCHUP_WINDOW_SECONDS.title: Boot-time catch-up window (seconds)
COMMY_CATCHUP_WINDOW_SECONDS.description: How far back to fetch recent messages across the boot-time subscribe set on a persistent-bot restart (comms-3wl). Default 14400 (4 hours). Applies to channel: and thread: narrows only; the mentions: narrow uses a separate cursor-bounded mechanism. Set to 0 to disable boot-time channel/thread catch-up.
